game_info.title: Temple Run - Endless Runner
game_info.concept:
The Original Endless Running Adventure!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/temple-run/id420009108

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The Original Endless Running Adventure!
Experience the thrill of Temple Run – the global phenomenon that redefined mobile gaming!
Steal the cursed idol and escape from the relentless Demon Monkeys in a heart-pounding adventure through ancient temples, jungle ruins, and precarious cliff edges.
Outrun danger in the ultimate maze-running, jungle-escaping, temple adventure!

- Swipe to turn, jump, and slide past deadly obstacles
- Race through temples, bridges, and treacherous paths
- Collect coins, unlock diverse characters, and boost your power-ups
- Test your reflexes in a fast and frenzied experience
- Challenge friends & climb the leaderboards

"Temple Run is that heart-pounding action movie moment – but non-stop!” – SlideToPlay
"One of the most thrilling and fun running games ever!" – TheAppera
"A fast and frenzied experience." – IGN
"Very addicting… a truly different running game!" – Appolicious

Join over 50 MILLION players worldwide in this legendary treasure-hunting escape!

Download now and see how far you can run!
game_info.description: You've stolen the cursed idol! Now run for your life through an endless ancient temple. Swipe left and right to turn corners, jump over gaps, and slide under obstacles. Collect golden coins to increase your score. The temple generates endlessly – how far can you run before the relentless Demon Monkey catches you? Your speed increases over time, making survival even more challenging!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left: Turn left at intersections
Arrow Right: Turn right at intersections
Arrow Up: Jump over obstacles and gaps
Arrow Down: Slide under low barriers
Space: Jump (alternative)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and coin collection. The AI will navigate through the temple path, making random turns and attempting to collect coins along the way.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot will randomly choose to turn left or right at intersections, jump occasionally, and slide when approaching low obstacles. It will prioritize forward movement and coin collection.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the player can navigate for at least 20 seconds without crashing, collecting at least 10 coins, and demonstrating all movement types (turning, jumping, sliding).

TEST_2.test_description: Testing optimal gameplay strategy with obstacle avoidance. The AI will attempt to survive as long as possible by making smart decisions at intersections and properly timing jumps and slides.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot analyzes upcoming obstacles and makes decisions based on the safest path. It will turn to avoid dead ends, jump over gaps, slide under barriers, and collect coins when safe to do so.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the player survives for at least 40 seconds, collects at least 30 coins, and successfully avoids all obstacle types multiple times, demonstrating mastery of the game mechanics.
